Source: AgentForce Developer Guide
URL: https://developer.salesforce.com/docs/ai/agentforce/guide
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Agentforce Developer Guide

## Overview
Agentforce is "the agent-driven layer of the Salesforce Platform" enabling deployment of AI agents for workforce augmentation and 24/7 customer service. Features a Trust Layer that "securely connects your data with the power of large language models (LLMs)."

## Core Capabilities
- Conversational AI agents built on secure Trust Layer architecture
- Integration of LLMs with enterprise data
- Customizable AI assistants within Salesforce

## Development Resources
1. APIs & SDKs — Tools for building Agentforce solutions
2. Agentforce Actions — Building and enhancing agent functionality
3. Agent Script — Specialized language for Agentforce Builder configuration
4. Agentforce DX — Professional-code tools for CLI and VS Code integration
5. Models & Prompts — LLM configuration and prompt template management via Prompt Builder

## Key Architecture
Trust Layer serves as secure connector between enterprise data and LLM capabilities. Platform supports both configuration-friendly and pro-code development approaches.

## Additional Resources
- Salesforce Help articles on Agentforce and Generative AI
- Agentforce Agents functionality documentation
